description: Generated from the packaged SCAN catalog plus skills/cisco-product-setup/catalog_overrides.json.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Enterprise wireless access points delivering high-performance Wi-Fi 6/6E connectivity for campus, branch, and outdoor deployments with centralized management through Catalyst Center or cloud.
products.notes: Access Points dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry rather than a separate AP-only collector.
products.value_proposition: Stream AP association, roaming, and RF telemetry into Splunk for wireless health and client-experience analytics.

products.description: Cisco Application Centric Infrastructure (ACI) — policy-driven data center automation with application profiles, micro-segmentation, and fabric-wide health monitoring.
products.value_proposition: Unified ACI fabric visibility in Splunk for faster root-cause analysis and compliance verification.

products.addon_label: Technology Add-on for Cisco Secure Access Control Server (ACS)
products.description: Cisco Secure Access Control Server (ACS) was a policy-driven access control platform providing centralized RADIUS and TACACS+ authentication, authorization, and accounting. ACS has been retired by Cisco and superseded by Cisco Identity Services Engine (ISE).
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream ACS authentication, authorization, and accounting events into Splunk for centralized network access visibility and compliance auditing.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: High-performance edge and aggregation routers for service provider and enterprise WAN environments, supporting carrier-grade NAT, MPLS, and segment routing.
products.notes: ASR dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry in the current repo automation.
products.value_proposition: Aggregate ASR syslog, performance counters, and routing events in Splunk for WAN backbone health monitoring.

products.description: AI Defense safeguards production applications from attacks and undesired responses in real time with guardrails automatically configured to specific model vulnerabilities. Provides model- and application-agnostic security and fast protection.
products.value_proposition: Leverage AI to detect and respond to network threats in real time.

products.description: Full-stack application performance monitoring and business observability — real-time visibility into application health, user experience, and business impact across hybrid and cloud-native environments.
products.value_proposition: Correlate APM metrics, traces, and business transactions with infrastructure data in Splunk for unified observability.

products.description: The Cisco Application Control Engine (ACE) was a hardware-based load balancer and application delivery controller providing server load balancing, SSL offloading, and application acceleration. ACE reached end-of-life in 2014 and end-of-support in 2019. Data ingestion is still supported via SC4S.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream ACE syslog events into Splunk via SC4S for legacy load balancer monitoring, compliance, and historical analysis.

products.description: Provides SaaS Security Posture Management (SSPM) to help organizations secure SaaS applications by identifying configuration risks, monitoring user activity, and enforcing best practices.
products.manual_gap_reason: No local setup route is defined for this product yet.
products.value_proposition: Continuously monitor SaaS app configurations and data access to eliminate shadow access and misconfigurations.

products.description: External attack surface monitoring platform (formerly Secure Cloud Insights) that continuously discovers, inventories, and assesses internet-facing assets across an organization's digital footprint. Identifies exposed services, misconfigurations, certificate issues, and vulnerabilities visible from an attacker's perspective via automated reconnaissance and risk scoring.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Cisco ASM asset discovery findings, exposure alerts, and risk scores into Splunk to correlate external attack surface intelligence with internal security telemetry for proactive vulnerability prioritization.

products.description: Large-scale on-premises and hybrid cloud calling platform serving service providers and enterprises with carrier-grade SIP-based voice, unified communications, and hosted collaboration features. Generates CDRs (Call Detail Records), audit logs, alarm syslog, and XSP/XSI API event data. Architecturally distinct from both CUCM (enterprise PBX) and Webex Calling (cloud-native).
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest BroadWorks CDRs, alarm logs, and audit events into Splunk for service provider call analytics, fraud detection, platform health monitoring, and SLA compliance reporting.

products.description: Cisco Bug Search and Analytics is a Splunk app that integrates with the Cisco Bug Search API to allow users to search, track, and analyze Cisco software bugs directly within Splunk. NOTE: This app is flagged internally for archival and may be removed from Splunkbase in a future release.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Search and analyze Cisco software bugs within Splunk for proactive vulnerability and defect tracking.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Carrier-class core routing platform for service provider networks, delivering multi-terabit switching capacity and high availability for large-scale IP/MPLS backbones.
products.notes: CRS dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry in the current repo automation.
products.value_proposition: Ingest CRS syslog and telemetry into Splunk for carrier-backbone fault correlation and capacity planning.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Network management solution leveraging AI to connect, secure, and automate network operations for routers, switches, and access points. Supports cloud and on-premises deployments with a single pane of glass.
products.value_proposition: Cisco Catalyst Center assurance data with Splunk for end-to-end network health and troubleshooting.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Cisco Catalyst™ SD-WAN connects any user to any application with integrated capabilities for multicloud, security, predictive automation, and enhanced network visibility — all on a Secure Access Service Edge (SASE)-enabled architecture. It also simplifies network operations by providing granular network insights, automation, and predictivity that not only heighten network integrity but also deliver an optimal application experience.
products.value_proposition: Unified visibility into SD-WAN health, tunnel performance, and policy compliance across all sites.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Enterprise campus and branch layer-2/3 switches including the Catalyst 9200, 9300, 9400, 9500, and 9600 (flagship campus), as well as the Catalyst 1000/1200/1300 (compact/SMB), 2960-X/XR (access), 3560/3650/3750/3850 (distribution), 4500/4900 (modular), and 6500/6800 (6000-series chassis) families — providing PoE, stacking, SD-Access, and advanced QoS for wired network infrastructure.
products.notes: Catalyst Switch dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry rather than a switch-only collector.
products.value_proposition: Correlate Catalyst switch syslog, interface stats, and spanning-tree events in Splunk for campus network assurance.

products.addon_label: Cisco Cloud Web Security (CWS) Add-on for Splunk
products.description: Cisco Cloud Web Security (CWS) was a cloud-delivered web security service providing advanced threat protection, URL filtering, and application visibility. CWS has been retired by Cisco and superseded by Cisco Umbrella / Cisco Secure Access.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream CWS web traffic logs and threat events into Splunk for unified security monitoring and compliance reporting.

products.addon_label: Cisco Secure Access Add-on for Splunk
products.app_viz_label: Cisco Secure Access App for Splunk
products.description: Cloud-native Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB) delivering visibility and control over users, data, and apps in cloud environments. Cloudlock monitors SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS for anomalous behavior, policy violations, and data exposure risks.
products.display_name: Cisco Cloudlock Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB)
normalized_search_terms: cisco cloudlock cloud access security broker casb
cisco cloudlock cloud access security broker
products.notes: Cloudlock dashboards need the Cloudlock-specific settings in addition to the base Secure Access org account.
search_terms: Cisco Cloudlock Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB)
Cisco Cloudlock Cloud Access Security Broker
products.value_proposition: Stream Cloudlock security events and policy alerts into Splunk for unified cloud application security monitoring.

products.description: Cisco Connected Mobile Experiences (CMX) was a location analytics platform that leveraged Wi-Fi infrastructure to provide real-time location tracking, proximity analytics, and engagement insights. CMX has been retired by Cisco and superseded by Cisco Spaces.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest CMX location, analytics, and presence data into Splunk for venue intelligence, visitor flow analysis, and operational reporting.

products.description: Cisco collaboration endpoint devices — Desk Pro, Board Pro, Room Kit, and Navigator — running RoomOS that generate rich environmental sensor telemetry including occupancy detection, people count, ambient noise levels, air quality (TVOC, CO₂), temperature, humidity, and ultrasonic pairing data, plus ThousandEyes Endpoint Agent network performance metrics from each device.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: A Splunk integration for RoomOS environmental and ThousandEyes endpoint telemetry could transform meeting rooms into smart building sensors — correlating occupancy patterns, air quality trends, and network performance to optimize real estate utilization and proactively identify collaboration experience degradation.

products.description: AI-powered network automation platform providing unified management, service health monitoring, traffic engineering, and BGP route observability across multivendor IP networks. Crosswork Network Controller automates provisioning and optimization; Crosswork Network Insights delivers cloud-based routing event security and control plane visibility.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Crosswork network automation events, BGP route anomalies, and service health metrics into Splunk for correlated network operations intelligence and proactive issue remediation.

products.description: Model-driven network automation and orchestration platform (formerly Tail-f NCS) for multi-vendor service provisioning, configuration management, and lifecycle automation. Uses YANG models and NETCONF/RESTCONF to abstract device differences and enable intent-based networking. Distinct from Crosswork Network Controller/Insights — NSO is the foundational orchestration engine used by service providers and large enterprises for automated service delivery across thousands of devices.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest NSO transaction logs, commit history, service lifecycle events, and device sync status into Splunk for network change auditing, service assurance, and automated remediation analytics.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Cisco Cyber Vision is a comprehensive solution designed to ensure the continuity, resilience, and safety of industrial operations by providing continuous visibility into Industrial Control Systems (ICS) and controlling the risks of cyber attacks. It offers full visibility into industrial networks and OT security posture, enabling asset owners to reduce the attack surface, segment the industrial network, and enforce cybersecurity policies.
products.value_proposition: Protect operational technology environments by identifying assets, vulnerabilities, and threats in real time.

products.description: Cisco Domain Protection was a service that automated the process of discovering and monitoring every domain and subdomain that sends email on your behalf. This product has been retired by Cisco.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream domain authentication and DMARC enforcement events into Splunk for email fraud visibility and brand protection analytics.

products.description: Zero trust is the future of information security - and Duo is your rock-solid foundation. Duo secures your workforce, taking access security beyond the corporate network perimeter to protect your data at every authentication attempt, from any device, anywhere.
products.value_proposition: MFA analytics, trust assessments, and adaptive authentication insights.

products.description: Cisco Secure Email Threat Defense provides the most comprehensive protection against damaging and costly threats that compromise your organization's brand and operations, while empowering your security response with expansive email security capabilities.
products.value_proposition: Detect and block email-borne threats before they reach the inbox.

products.description: Provides enhanced visibility and telemetry from endpoints, supporting advanced threat detection and response as part of Cisco's security portfolio.
products.notes: Cisco Security Cloud ships EVM knowledge objects and dashboards, but EVM telemetry is not configured through a CiscoSecurityCloud modular input in this repo. Install/validate Cisco Security Cloud here, then feed EVM sourcetypes through the supported upstream EVM pipeline.
products.value_proposition: Bridge the network/endpoint gap by correlating flow data with process-level context for faster investigations.

products.description: Video firewall traversal and B2B calling gateway — enables secure video collaboration across enterprise boundaries without opening inbound firewall ports. Active successor to the retired Cisco TelePresence Video Communication Server (TVCS). Provides SIP/H.323 interworking, MRA (Mobile and Remote Access) for Jabber/Webex clients, and Microsoft interoperability.
products.manual_gap_reason: No local setup route is defined for this product yet.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Expressway syslog events into Splunk for video infrastructure monitoring, firewall traversal troubleshooting, and MRA session analytics.

products.description: Cisco XDR simplifies security operations and empowers security teams to detect, prioritize, and respond to the most sophisticated threats. Integrating with the broader Cisco security portfolio and select third-party offerings, it is one of the most comprehensive and flexible solutions on the market.
normalized_search_terms: cisco extended detection and response xdr
products.value_proposition: Unified XDR visibility correlating alerts from endpoints, network, cloud, and email.

products.description: Hyperconverged infrastructure platform combining compute, storage, and networking into a unified cluster managed through Intersight or HX Connect. Runs the HX Data Platform for distributed storage with native replication, deduplication, and compression. Distinct from UCS (compute-only) — HyperFlex adds software-defined storage and can be managed via Intersight alongside UCS.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest HyperFlex cluster health metrics, storage performance telemetry, replication status, and hardware alerts into Splunk for unified HCI operations monitoring alongside UCS and Intersight data.

products.description: AI-native, eBPF-based distributed security architecture that embeds enforcement points across cloud, data center, and campus fabrics — delivering autonomous segmentation, vulnerability shielding, and exploit protection without traditional firewall appliances.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: When a Splunk integration becomes available, Hypershield telemetry could provide deep visibility into autonomous micro-segmentation events, eBPF-level enforcement actions, and AI-driven threat shielding across hybrid environments.

products.description: Cisco Identity Intelligence focuses on detecting, monitoring, and responding to identity-based threats. By centralizing and correlating identity data, it provides visibility into user behaviors and risks with ITDR and identity posture management capabilities.
products.notes: Choose the Cisco Identity Intelligence ingestion mode with --set variant webhook or --set variant aws_s3.
products.value_proposition: Identity analytics and risk scoring to close identity-based attack vectors.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Cisco Identity Services Engine is the industry's only complete Network Access Control (NAC) solution that provides customers with the ability to see users and devices, control access across wired, wireless VPN, and 5G connections to the corporate network. Cisco ISE works with network devices to create an all-encompassing contextual identity with endpoint users and attributes to apply highly secure access policies through a simple, flexible, and highly consumable platform.
products.value_proposition: Centralized identity and access policy enforcement with deep visibility into who and what is on the network.

products.description: Purpose-built Industrial Ethernet switches (IE3x00, IE9300) and Industrial Routers (IR1100, IR8100, IR8340) designed for OT/ICS environments — providing ruggedized, DIN-rail-mounted networking with CIP/Modbus awareness, hazardous-location certifications, and Cyber Vision integration for operational technology networks.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: A future Splunk integration for industrial networking could bring OT network telemetry — spanning-tree events, CIP inspection logs, and environmental alerts — into the SOC, bridging the IT/OT visibility divide.

products.description: Embedded baseboard management controller for Cisco UCS C-Series and S-Series servers — hardware health monitoring, remote console, firmware management via Web UI, CLI, XML API, Redfish, and SNMPv3.
products.manual_gap_reason: No local setup route is defined for this product yet.
products.value_proposition: Stream IMC hardware alerts, firmware events, and CIMC telemetry into Splunk for proactive server health monitoring across data center and branch deployments.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Branch and edge routers combining routing, security, WAN optimization, and voice services in a single platform across the ISR 800, 1000, and 4000 series.
products.notes: ISR dashboards depend on Catalyst Center telemetry in the current repo automation.
products.value_proposition: Centralize ISR syslog, NetFlow, and VPN tunnel events in Splunk for branch-connectivity visibility and troubleshooting.

products.description: Cloud-based infrastructure management — lifecycle management, monitoring, and optimization for UCS and HyperFlex.
products.value_proposition: Surface Intersight alerts and infrastructure health data in Splunk for unified IT operations visibility.

products.description: Carrier-grade routing platforms running IOS-XR — including the Network Convergence System (NCS 540, 560, 5500, 5700) for SP aggregation, metro Ethernet, and 5G backhaul, and the Silicon One-powered 8000 Series for backbone and peering fabrics — delivering 100G/400G density, segment routing, EVPN, and model-driven telemetry (gRPC/gNMI) at carrier scale.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: A future Splunk TA for IOS-XR could ingest syslog, model-driven telemetry, BGP peering events, and segment-routing policy changes — giving SP and enterprise NOCs unified visibility into carrier-grade routing health alongside campus and data center infrastructure already monitored in Splunk.

products.description: Isovalent Runtime Security is an eBPF-based technology for runtime security visibility and enforcement for Kubernetes workloads and Linux VMs. It provides deep runtime and network visibility to support threat detection, incident investigation, and security compliance.
products.value_proposition: Deep kernel-level visibility into container networking and runtime security.

products.description: Edge-based telemetry processing - filter, enrich, and route observability data at the source.
products.value_proposition: Reduce data volume and cost by processing telemetry at the edge before ingestion.

products.description: MDS 9000 series multilayer SAN directors and fabric switches providing Fibre Channel, FCoE, and FCIP-based storage networking for enterprise data centers — with analytics, encryption, and slow-drain detection for mission-critical storage fabrics.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Splunk integration could ingest MDS zone-change events, port-flap alerts, slow-drain analytics, and fabric-health metrics — giving storage and data-center teams real-time SAN visibility alongside compute and network telemetry.

products.description: Mandatory management application for Cisco Meeting Server — monitor and control active meetings, manage participants, configure layouts, start/stop recording or streaming, and provision conference templates.
products.manual_gap_reason: No local setup route is defined for this product yet.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Meeting Management audit logs and operational events into Splunk for meeting lifecycle analytics and compliance monitoring.

products.description: On-premises video conferencing - multi-party meetings, webinars, and interoperability across standards-based endpoints.
products.manual_gap_reason: No local setup route is defined for this product yet.
products.value_proposition: Ingest CMS call detail records and system logs into Splunk for meeting quality analytics and capacity planning.

products.description: Cloud-managed networking — wireless, switching, security, and SD-WAN managed through the Meraki dashboard.
products.notes: This repo prefers the dedicated Meraki TA and can also apply the Enterprise Networking companion dashboards used by the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Bring Meraki event logs, client analytics, and network health into Splunk for full-stack network observability.

products.description: Cisco Multicloud Defense protects all of your cloud environments using a single software-as-a-service (SaaS) control plane, eliminating inefficient, complex, and costly point solutions.
products.value_proposition: Single pane of glass for multicloud firewall, WAF, and DLP policy enforcement.

products.addon_label: Cisco Network Assurance Engine Add-on for Splunk Enterprise (Cisco NAE)
products.app_viz_label: Cisco Network Assurance Engine App for Splunk Enterprise (Cisco NAE)
products.description: Cisco Network Assurance Engine (NAE) provided continuous verification and assurance of the entire data center network. NAE has been retired by Cisco and its capabilities are now part of Cisco Nexus Dashboard Insights.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream NAE assurance events and verification results into Splunk for proactive data center network health monitoring.

products.description: The Network Visibility Module (NVM) of Cisco Secure Client collects rich flow context from an endpoint on or off premise and provides visibility into network connected devices and user behaviors when coupled with a Cisco solution such as Splunk.
products.value_proposition: Enrich security analytics with detailed endpoint-to-network flow context.

products.description: Centralized operations hub for data center fabrics - Insights, Orchestrator, and Data Broker services.
products.value_proposition: Stream Nexus Dashboard operational data into Splunk for proactive alerting and cross-fabric analytics.

products.description: Cloud-managed data center networking delivered as a service — simplified operations, automated lifecycle management, and AI-driven insights for modern workloads.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream HyperFabric operational telemetry into Splunk for unified data center visibility and proactive issue detection.

products.description: High-performance data center switches - spine/leaf fabrics, VXLAN, and NX-OS telemetry.
products.value_proposition: Correlate Nexus switch telemetry with Splunk for real-time data center fabric health and troubleshooting.

products.description: Predictive optics monitoring leveraging the Common Management Interface Specification (CMIS) to collect real-time environmental and performance telemetry from pluggable transceivers in Nexus, Catalyst, and NCS platforms — including temperature, voltage, optical power (Tx/Rx), laser bias current, and bit error rates for proactive failure detection in AI factory and data center fabrics.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: A Splunk integration for optic CMIS telemetry could deliver the "Holy Grail" of predictive failure analysis — correlating optic degradation patterns against fabric topology to prevent link failures before they cascade through AI training clusters or production workloads.

products.description: Cloud-Native Application Protection Platform (CNAPP) providing Kubernetes security, service-mesh telemetry, container runtime protection, API security, and cloud workload posture management for multi-cloud and hybrid environments.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Future Splunk integration could ingest K8s policy violations, container runtime anomalies, API abuse events, and cloud-workload posture findings — closing the gap for cloud-native security visibility that competitors already offer.

products.description: Cisco Prime Infrastructure provided converged wired and wireless network management. Prime Infrastructure has been retired by Cisco and superseded by Cisco Catalyst Center (formerly DNA Center).
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream Prime Infrastructure alerts, device inventory, and compliance data into Splunk for unified network operations analytics.

products.description: End-to-end transport and service assurance platform (formerly Accedian Skylight) providing sub-microsecond network performance monitoring, SLA validation, and synthetic testing across carrier, enterprise, and cloud-interconnect environments. NOTE: The Accedian Skylight apps are archived and no longer maintained.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Previously integrated PCA performance metrics, SLA-violation events, and synthetic-test results into Splunk for network operations transport-quality dashboards.

products.addon_label: Cisco PSIRT openVuln API Add-on for Splunk
products.description: Cisco Product Security Incident Response Team (PSIRT) manages the receipt, investigation, and public reporting of security vulnerability information related to Cisco products and networks. The openVuln API provides machine-consumable access to Cisco security advisories. NOTE: The Splunkbase add-on for this product may be archived.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Cisco PSIRT security advisories and vulnerability data into Splunk for proactive vulnerability management and prioritized patching.

products.description: DDoS mitigation, bot management, WAF, and API protection powered by Radware.
products.manual_gap_reason: No local setup route is defined for this product yet.
products.value_proposition: Correlate DDoS attack telemetry and application-layer threat data with the broader Cisco security stack.

products.addon_label: Cisco Secure Access Add-on for Splunk
products.app_viz_label: Cisco Secure Access App for Splunk
products.description: Cisco Secure Access provides zero trust access, a secure web gateway, cloud access security broker, firewall as a service, and more for hybrid workforce security. This cloud-delivered SSE solution gives users an exceptional experience and protected access from any device to anywhere.
products.value_proposition: Consolidate remote access, web security, and cloud app control into a single pane in Splunk.

products.description: Cloud-native network detection and response — monitors public cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP), private network, and SaaS environments for threats without deploying sensors or agents. Uses entity modeling and behavioral analytics on VPC Flow Logs, cloud provider telemetry, and NetFlow. Originally Stealthwatch Cloud; now unified under the Cisco Security Cloud alongside Secure Network Analytics (on-prem SNA). Data flows through XDR into the Security Cloud app.
products.manual_gap_reason: No cisco-product-setup route is defined yet for this product's addon CiscoSecurityCloud.
products.value_proposition: Extend network threat detection from on-prem (SNA) to public cloud and SaaS — surfacing cloud-native alerts, entity risk scores, and behavioral anomalies in Splunk for unified SOC visibility across hybrid environments.

products.description: Email security gateway — anti-spam, anti-malware, DLP, encryption, and advanced phishing protection for inbound and outbound email. Formerly Cisco Email Security Appliance (ESA).
products.notes: Installs the Splunk-supported Cisco ESA add-on. Configure ESA log forwarding or SC4S collection outside this product router, then validate the app and sourcetypes.
products.value_proposition: Centralize ESA mail logs, message tracking, and threat verdicts in Splunk for rapid email incident response.

products.description: Cisco Secure Endpoint offers advanced endpoint protection across control points, enabling your business to stay resilient. Detect faster, garner more insights, and respond and remediate more quickly with cloud-based attack research and response features.
products.value_proposition: Endpoint detection and response with retrospective security and file trajectory.

products.description: OT-SASE solution providing secure remote access to industrial equipment — combining zero-trust network access, privileged session recording, and IT/OT threat correlation for operational technology environments without exposing ICS/SCADA systems to the open internet.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Future Splunk integration could unify IT and OT threat views by ingesting SEA session logs, remote-access audit trails, and privileged-command recordings — enabling SOC teams to detect lateral movement attempts crossing the IT/OT boundary.

products.description: The integration of Secure Firewall Threat Defense (formerly Firepower Threat Defense) provides the capability to investigate, identify, and enrich intrusion events with context from integrations across products. It offers automated triage and prioritization of intrusion events through incidents.
normalized_search_terms: cisco secure firewall ftd estreamer asa
products.notes: Choose the Secure Firewall collection mode with --set variant api, estreamer, syslog, or asa_syslog.
products.value_proposition: Unified firewall and VPN visibility across all ASA and FTD devices.

products.description: Cisco Secure IPS (formerly Cisco IPS) was a dedicated intrusion prevention appliance. The standalone IPS appliance line has been retired by Cisco; IPS functionality is now integrated into Cisco Secure Firewall (Firepower).
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest IPS alerts, signatures, and event data into Splunk for threat investigation and compliance reporting.

products.description: Cisco Secure Malware Analytics (formerly Cisco Threat Grid) combines advanced sandboxing with threat intelligence into a powerful solution to protect organizations from malware. It is an advanced automated malware analysis and threat intelligence platform in which suspicious files or web destinations can be detonated without impacting the user environment.
products.value_proposition: Deep-dive malware analysis with threat scores, behavioral indicators, and file relationships.

products.description: Analyze your existing network data to help detect threats that may have found a way to bypass your existing controls, before they can do serious damage.
products.value_proposition: Detect threats hiding in encrypted traffic and east-west movement without decryption.

products.description: Enforce zero trust consistently, accurately. Designed for scale and speed, Secure Workload makes zero trust achievable by consistently and accurately enforcing microsegmentation across your entire application landscape - any workload, any location.
products.value_proposition: Workload-level visibility, segmentation policy, and compliance enforcement.

products.addon_label: Cisco SecureX threat response - Custom Search Command
products.app_viz_label: Cisco SecureX threat response - Relay module
products.description: Cisco SecureX was a cloud-native security platform that connected the Cisco security portfolio and infrastructure. SecureX has been retired by Cisco and superseded by Cisco XDR.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is retired or deprecated in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Stream SecureX threat response events and orchestration data into Splunk for unified security operations visibility.

products.description: SaaS-based centralized management console (formerly Cisco Defense Orchestrator / CDO) for provisioning, orchestrating, and monitoring Cisco Secure Firewall policies across hybrid environments — providing unified policy management, change tracking, and compliance reporting for distributed firewall estates.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: A future Splunk integration could surface firewall policy-change audit trails, compliance drift events, and orchestration job outcomes — enabling SecOps teams to correlate policy changes with security incidents across the entire firewall estate.

products.description: Cisco SONiC (Software for Open Networking in the Cloud) — open-source Network Operating System running on Cisco 8000 Series Silicon One routers — providing disaggregated, Linux-based networking with rsyslogd, SAI (Switch Abstraction Interface), BGP, LLDP, and container-based microservices (orchagent, syncd, teamd) for hyperscale data center and WAN fabrics. NOTE: SONiC is a distinct NOS from IOS XR — the same Cisco 8000 hardware can run either. SC4S currently supports Dell SONiC; Cisco SONiC uses a similar rsyslog format but needs its own sourcetype and CIM-mapped TA for field extractions.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: A dedicated Splunk TA for Cisco SONiC could ingest rsyslog events from orchagent, syncd, teamd, and BGP subsystems — mapping them to CIM (Network Traffic, Authentication, Change) and giving hyperscale and SP NOCs the same operational visibility they have for IOS XR platforms, but for open NOS deployments.

products.description: Cloud-based location services and IoT platform (successor to Cisco CMX/DNA Spaces) providing indoor positioning, asset tracking, environmental monitoring, and occupancy analytics for smart buildings and campus environments using Catalyst and Meraki AP infrastructure. A third-party add-on by Tjene (Splunk Partner) exists on Splunkbase but lacks props.conf — data arrives un-normalised.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Cisco Spaces location analytics, occupancy trends, and IoT sensor events into Splunk — enabling facilities and security teams to correlate physical-space intelligence with network and security data.

products.addon_label: Cisco Talos Intelligence for Enterprise Security Cloud
products.description: Threat intelligence — IP/domain/file reputation, vulnerability research, and incident response from Cisco's threat intelligence group.
products.notes: Installs Cisco Talos Intelligence for Enterprise Security Cloud. This integration requires a supported Splunk Enterprise Security Cloud deployment; finish Talos setup in the ES/SOAR workflow.
products.value_proposition: Enrich Splunk events with Talos threat intelligence for faster triage and higher-fidelity detections.

products.description: Network telemetry brokering platform that ingests, filters, transforms, and routes telemetry data (NetFlow v5/v9, IPFIX, VPC/NSG Flow Logs, syslog) from multiple sources to multiple consumers across hybrid cloud environments. Acts as a centralized telemetry fabric between network devices and analytics tools.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Cisco Telemetry Broker operational health, pipeline metrics, and data routing events into Splunk for monitoring CTB performance and ensuring telemetry delivery integrity across the analytics pipeline.

products.app_viz_label: Cisco Enterprise Networking for Splunk Platform
products.description: Digital experience monitoring - internet, cloud, and SaaS visibility with synthetic and real-user monitoring.
products.value_proposition: End-to-end path visibility from user to application across every network hop.

products.description: Cisco TelePresence Video Communication Server (TVCS) — video conferencing session control and firewall traversal platform that enables rich video collaboration across and beyond enterprise networks for organizations using Cisco TelePresence conferencing applications.

products.value_proposition: Ingest TVCS syslog and CDR events into Splunk for video infrastructure monitoring, call quality analytics, and firewall traversal troubleshooting.

products.addon_label: Cisco Secure Access Add-on for Splunk
products.app_viz_label: Cisco Secure Access App for Splunk
products.description: Threat intelligence investigation platform providing real-time domain, IP, and ASN reputation scoring, WHOIS enrichment, DNS query volume analytics, and co-occurrence analysis — enabling analysts to pivot across indicators and map attacker infrastructure during incident investigations.
products.value_proposition: Enrich Splunk investigations with Umbrella Investigate's real-time threat intelligence — pivot from any domain or IP to reputation scores, passive DNS history, and related infrastructure in seconds.

products.description: Enterprise call control - IP telephony, unified messaging, video, and mobility services for voice infrastructure.

products.value_proposition: Correlate CUCM CDR/CMR records and syslog events in Splunk for voice quality monitoring and capacity management.

products.description: Unified computing — server, networking, and storage access in a single integrated architecture for data center and cloud.
products.notes: Installs the Splunk-supported Cisco UCS add-on. Configure UCS Manager inputs in the add-on UI or supported Splunk docs.
products.value_proposition: Correlate UCS hardware faults, firmware events, and blade telemetry with Splunk for proactive data center operations.

products.description: Cisco Vulnerability Intelligence is a research tool that provides access to threat intelligence. It combines CVE information like vectors and CVSS scores with vulnerability chatter, changes to the Cisco Security Risk Score, and exploit and fix data. Cisco Vulnerability Intelligence includes not only published CVEs but reserved CVEs as well, updating them with new information as it becomes available and normalizing the data into an easy to read, familiar format.
products.value_proposition: Enrich Splunk investigations with CVE context, exploit data, and Cisco Security Risk Scores.

products.description: Secure web gateway — URL filtering, malware scanning, application visibility, and data loss prevention for web traffic.
products.notes: Installs the Splunk-supported Cisco WSA add-on. Configure WSA log forwarding or SC4S collection outside this product router, then validate the app and sourcetypes.
products.value_proposition: Stream WSA access logs and threat verdicts into Splunk for web traffic analytics and policy compliance.

products.description: All-in-one collaboration - meetings, messaging, calling, and whiteboarding in a unified cloud platform.
products.notes: Installs the Webex Add-on for Splunk. Configure Webex REST API inputs in the add-on UI or vendor documentation.
products.value_proposition: Stream Webex meeting telemetry, call detail records, and admin audit events into Splunk for collaboration analytics.

products.description: Cisco's next-generation contact center platform providing omnichannel customer engagement (voice, chat, email, social), AI-powered agent assistance, workforce optimization, interaction analytics, and real-time supervisor dashboards. Available as both a cloud-native SaaS (CCaaS) offering and an on-premises deployment for organizations that cannot send data to the cloud. WxCC is the strategic successor to Cisco UCCE/UCCX.
products.manual_gap_reason: This product is a roadmap / coverage-gap item in the SCAN catalog.
products.value_proposition: Ingest Webex Contact Center CDRs, agent performance metrics, queue analytics, and interaction events into Splunk for contact center operations intelligence, SLA monitoring, and workforce planning.

products.description: Centralized cloud management portal for all Webex services — users, devices, calling, meetings, messaging, and contact center. Provides analytics dashboards, troubleshooting tools, security/compliance settings, and audit logging across the Webex platform.

products.value_proposition: Ingest Control Hub audit logs, device telemetry, and admin events into Splunk for unified Webex governance, compliance monitoring, and operational analytics.
